arts.ttl: Arsenal's Kai Havertz, Jurrien Timber set unwanted record in Man City draw
arts.sum: Arsenal duo Kai Havertz and Jurrien Timber make unwanted Premier League history in the Gunners' 2-2 draw with Manchester City at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues Rodri injury update after Man City's thriller with Arsenal
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is unsure of the severity of the injury that Rodri suffered in Manchester City's pulsating 2-2 draw with Arsenal in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Manchester City stars Bernardo Silva and John Stones call Arsenal's 'dark arts' into question after tensions during fiery 2-2 draw descended into angry scenes at the Etihad
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Manchester City's Bernardo Silva and John Stones last night took aim at Arsenal's dark arts after a tempestuous 2-2 draw at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man City injury news and return dates for Watford: Rodri, De Bruyne latest
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up Manchester City's injury and suspension news ahead of their EFL Cup third-round clash with Watford.

arts.ttl: Draw at Man City a sure sign 'remarkable' Arsenal can win the title
arts.sum: Inevitably, mixed in with immense pride at his side’s dogged defiance and conviction that they had "made another big step today as a team and individually", there was disappointment for Arsenal and Arteta having come so close to a first league win at Man City since 2015. The Gunners, who have become Man City’s nearest challengers as runners-up in each of the last two seasons, were seconds away from what would surely have been Arteta’s best win in charge of Arsenal had they held on.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Watford: Carabao Cup prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side strong favourites to reach fourth round

arts.ttl: Carra and Nev analyse title race: 'Man City have the edge'
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundit Jamie Carragher says Manchester City have the edge over Arsenal in the Premier League title race this season.

arts.ttl: Bernardo Silva blasts Arsenal for 'anti-football' as Man City star points finger at ref in Etihad epic
arts.sum: Portugal star Silva has slammed the Gunners approach in the thrilling 2-2 draw and accused referee Michael Oliver of allowing them to waste time

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola slams Arsenal antics and aims subtle dig at Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Manchester City and Arsenal played out a dramatic 2-2 draw at the Etihad Stadium with John Stones scoring an equaliser for the home side deep into stoppage-time

arts.ttl: Peter Schmeichel Savages Michael Oliver in Man City 2-2 Arsenal
arts.sum: The referee didn't have the best of games
